ideation: This sequence will depict a pig's playful snuffling and rooting behavior.  The animation will focus on the robot's arms mimicking the action of a pig's snout searching for food.  The arms will move in a coordinated, slightly clumsy manner to enhance the playful nature of the emoji. Frame 1 will show the arms in a neutral position; Frame 2 will show the arms moving downwards in a slight 'digging' motion, the wrists slightly rotated outward to simulate a snuffling snout; Frame 3 will have the arms raising slightly, as if the pig has found something; Frame 4 will show the arms moving back to the neutral position.

frames.beat: arms hang down, ready to root
arms lower and snuffle the ground playfully
arms lift slightly, as if finding a treat
arms return to a neutral, resting state
